lab_identity.name: CSNL (Cognitive and Systems Neuroscience Laboratory)
lab_identity.core_philosophy: Build computational/normative models that bridge behavioral phenomena and neural mechanisms. Not just describing behavior вҖ” providing principled connections between behavior and brain via model structure.
lab_identity.research_pattern: Pit two competing hypotheses on the same computational framework and let data adjudicate. Examples: reward vs evidence (feedback), sensory-adaptation vs boundary-updating (repulsive bias), diffusion-only vs drift-diffusion (WM bias).

BRL_2025_2026.title: м–‘ м •ліҙмІҳлҰ¬ (Quantity Information Processing)
BRL_2025_2026.core: мғҒлҢҖнҷ” (relativization via CDF) + мқҙмӮ°нҷ” (discretization via granularity)
BRL_2025_2026.lee_lab_role: P1 н–үлҸҷмӢӨн—ҳ (Time2Dist), P2 fMRI (7T), P3 мЎ°нҳ„лі‘ к№ҖлҜјм•„(NOT our lab), P4 RNN мһ„мұ„мҳҒ(NOT our lab)

jungyun_2024.title: л°ҳл°ңм¶”м • vs лҒҢлҰјм¶”м •мқҳ мӢ кІҪмӣҗмІң к·ңлӘ…
jungyun_2024.core: к°җк°ҒмӢңмҠӨн…ң(feedforwardвҶ’repulsion) vs кё°м–өмӢңмҠӨн…ң(feedbackвҶ’attraction). Subtraction design: sensory+memory activity minus sensory-only вҶ’ memory manifold.

group_A.focus: Bayesian observer models, history effects, serial dependence reference frames, magnitude normalization

JOP.RingRepSca: Decision commitment м—ҶмқҙлҸ„ relative spaceмҷҖ absolute spaceлҠ” лҸ…лҰҪм ҒмңјлЎң мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳл©° н‘ңмғҒк°„ history effectк°Җ л°°нғҖм Ғ. Estimation-only paradigmм—җм„ң л‘җ мўҢн‘ңкі„мқҳ л¶„лҰ¬мҷҖ лҸ…лҰҪм Ғ history effect кІҖмҰқ. мӨ‘кІ¬ Grantмқҳ feedforward(repulsion) vs feedback(attraction) н”„л Ҳмһ„кіј м—°кІ°.
JOP.Time: Duration estimationм—җм„ң orientationкіј лҸҷмқјн•ң BMBU кө¬мЎ°к°Җ history effectлҘј м„ӨлӘ…н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ кІҖмҰқ. MCMC fitting.
JOP.Time2Dist: BRL P1 м§ҒкІ°. мһҗк·№ л¶„нҸ¬ н•ҷмҠө мӢң CDF normalization(мғҒлҢҖнҷ”) vs point estimate. Skewed distributionмңјлЎң H1(mean) vs H2(range) vs H3(CDF) л¶„лҰ¬.
JOP.GranRDT: Granularity effect вҖ” DV spaceм—җм„ң decision commitmentк°Җ belief лІ”мң„лҘј мўҒнһҲкі  granularityк°Җ лҶ’мқ„мҲҳлЎқ future choiceлҘј лҚ” к°•н•ҳкІҢ attract. 6мў… cost function + hierarchical MCMC.
JOP.GranNMDS: Perceptual similarity space (Shepardian distance)к°Җ granularity effectмқҳ кё°м Җ кө¬мЎ°мқём§Җ. NMDS + custom MCMC.

MSY.CatVsMag: лҸҷмқј мһҗк·№(face gender spectrum)м—җм„ң categorical vs magnitude taskк°Җ лӢӨлҘё generative model вҶ’ лӢӨлҘё serial dependence. Categoricalм—җм„ң X-shape SD (choice repetition + alternation кіөмЎҙ) + gambler's fallacy л°ңкІ¬. StyleGAN2, Prolific n=27, hierarchical Bayesian model.

group_A.gist_relevance: Serial dependence reference frame (relative vs absolute, object-centered), estimation-only history effect, Bayesian estimation, categorical vs continuous decision, gambler's fallacy computational origin, CDF-based normalization, granularity effect, DV space belief dynamics.

group_B.focus: RNN modeling, visual working memory representation, attractor dynamics, neural geometry

JYK.RNN: Stimulus-specific biasмҷҖ decision-consistent biasмқҳ кіөнҶө мӣҗмІңмңјлЎңм„ң drift-diffusion dynamics in WM. Gu et al. (2025, Neuron) нҷ•мһҘ. Persistent vs sequential coding spectrum (Orhan & Ma, Liu TRNN). Non-normal recurrent connectivity. PCA state space analysis.

MJC.SeqVWM: Sequential VWMм—җм„ң low contrast вҶ’ attraction, high contrast вҶ’ repulsion. SOB лӘЁлҚёмқҳ energy field (primacy gradient + response suppression). Kilpatrick (2018) attractor model. Serial position: precedingвҶ’attraction, succeedingвҶ’repulsion.

SK.WMRepresentation: EVCк°Җ sensory inputкіј WM contentлҘј geometry-preservingн•ҳлҗҳ orthogonal population subspaceм—җ re-embedding. dPCAлЎң sensory vs mnemonic code л¶„лҰ¬. 50 subjects fMRI. Cross-generalization мӢӨнҢЁ вҶ’ different code. мӨ‘кІ¬ Grantмқҳ feedforward vs feedback мӢ кІҪм Ғ л¶„лҰ¬.

group_B.gist_relevance: RNN models of WM biases, persistent vs transient coding, non-normal dynamics, drift-diffusion and attractor interaction, sequential WM interaction, contrast-dependent bias, energy landscape, sensory vs mnemonic code in EVC, orthogonal subspaces, dPCA methodology.

group_C.focus: Visual cortex functional architecture, RF structure, spatial representation, natural image statistics, V1-to-percept transformation

JHR.SpatialExtent: Ryu & Lee 2024 (Comms Bio): EVC pRF anisotropy = radiality dominant, perception = co-axiality dominant. к°ңмқём°ЁлҠ” shared (r=0.52, 0.57). Oriented grating pRFлЎң degeneracy н•ҙкІ°. Bounded contribution вҶ’ downstream transformation mechanism н•„мҡ”.
JHR.FC_orientation: Ryu & Lee 2018 (Cereb Cortex): Tuning similarity overrides distance factors (rВІ=0.312). Feature-specific resting-state FC in V1-V4. RadialвҶ’co-axial hierarchical shift in orientation-specific FC.
JHR.current: CNN retina model interpretation (Maheswaranathan). V1-V4 hierarchical FC structure.

SMJ.Concentricity: Co-circularity (higher-order natural image statistic). Saccadic eye movementsк°Җ concentric structureм—җ м „лһөм ҒмңјлЎң н–Ҙн•ҳлҠ”м§Җ. Image memory task + eye-tracking. Memory performanceмҷҖ saccadic efficiency мғҒкҙҖ.
SMJ.V1toPercept: JHRмқҳ radial/co-axial frameworkлҘј н–үлҸҷмңјлЎң нҷ•мһҘ. NSD + GLMdenoise мқён”„лқј. Saliency-based segmentation. Iacaruso 2017 co-axial synaptic organization м°ёмЎ°.

group_C.gist_relevance: pRF anisotropy across visual hierarchy, resting-state orientation-specific FC, radial/co-axial bias transformation, natural image statistics and cortical organization, contour integration, co-circularity, eye movement optimization, V1-to-percept transformation, saliency models.

independent_JSL.focus: Serial dependence spatial reference frames, visual attention and WM, navigation memory

JSL.SerialDep_Spatial: Lim & Lee 2023 (Sci Rep): SDлҠ” absoluteк°Җ м•„лӢҢ relative (object-centered) coordinateм—җм„ң мЎ°м Ҳ. Same-relative-loc 4.14В° >> Different 2.66В°, p<0.01. Identity-based view м§Җм§Җ. Non-target-to-target SDм—җм„ңлҸ„ лҸҷмқј. Higher associative cortex (parietal, LOT)лҘј мӢңмӮ¬.
JSL.Attraction_asymmetry: GRM 240924: Comparative judgmentм—җм„ң decision targetм—җ лҢҖн•ң attractionл§Ң мң мқҳ, referenceлҠ” м•„лӢҳ. Task-relevant itemмқҙ лҸҷл“ұн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  selection/commitment л°©н–Ҙмқҙ history effect кІ°м •.
JSL.Passive_navigation: Lim et al. 2025 (Imaging Neurosci): Passive navigationм—җм„ң canonical cortico-hippocampal dynamics. ISC кё°л°ҳ large-scale cortical region dynamics.

independent_JSL.gist_relevance: Serial dependence reference frames (object-centered, retinotopic, world-centered), attention gating of serial dependence, comparative judgment asymmetry, decision target vs reference, passive navigation memory, ISC methodology.

scoring.note: Gist-based evaluation, NOT keyword matching. Read abstract holistically and judge whether the paper's core contribution would advance any CSNL project.

scan_window.note: Rolling 3-month window from current date. Computed as today - scan_window_days.

embedding.note: Multimodal embedding for text+image. Used in scan (dual validation), score (reranking), draft (figure selection).

grm_themes: Serial dependence coordinate systems & reference frames (JOP, JSL, MSY)
Bayesian estimation & bias computational origin (JOP, MSY, lab-wide)
Attractor dynamics & WM encoding (JYK, MJC, SK)
RadialвҶ’co-axial transformation & natural image statistics (JHR, SMJ)

agents.drafter: Generates initial Slack post from scoring + context
agents.accuracy_evaluator: Abstract-grounded claims, Slack ID verification, project mapping
agents.member_advocate: Per-member relevance check вҖ” would this member actually care?
agents.final_editor: Tone, formatting, Korean/English consistency, length constraints
